suspect_description: A wealthy collector obsessed with order, Victor treats his possessions as extensions of his control and does not take kindly to things going missing.
A poised socialite who always seems to know what everyone else is up to, Claire maintains control in every situation, especially when something valuable is involved.
A meticulous housemaid who notices everything, Penny keeps track of the estate’s routines and who strays from them.
A dignified butler whose calm professionalism hides a precise awareness of who goes where and when.
A reserved groundskeeper who spends long hours outside and is often overlooked by those inside the house.
A longtime family friend with expensive tastes and a sharp eye for detail, Lillian shares a complicated history with the Auren family that still lingers beneath the surface.
A composed and calculating host, Victor treats the dinner as both a social event and a strategic opportunity, carefully managing conversations and outcomes throughout the evening.
A poised socialite who thrives in controlled settings, Claire ensures the evening runs smoothly, keeping a close eye on both the guests and the impression they leave.
A longtime family friend with a sharp tongue and sharper instincts, Lillian observes the evening with quiet interest, never missing an opportunity to comment on what others overlook.
A wealthy and ambitious businessman, Marcus maintains a polished demeanor while navigating the evening’s conversations, always attentive to what might benefit him.
The Auren estate’s head chef, Gordon takes pride in delivering a flawless dining experience, though the pressure of the evening leaves little room for mistakes.
A dignified and attentive butler, Alfred oversees the flow of service with precision, ensuring each course and interaction proceeds without disruption.
A controlled and authoritative figure, Victor expects the household to function with precision and is quick to notice when something disrupts that order.
Composed and observant, Claire keeps careful track of appearances and expectations, even when the situation begins to slip beyond her control.
A frequent guest and associate of Victor’s, Marcus is accustomed to structured environments and pays close attention to inconsistencies that might affect his interests.
The family’s chauffeur, responsible for arrivals and departures, and familiar with the household’s strict schedule. He is often aware of where people are meant to be, even if they are not there.
A meticulous observer of the household, Penny notices small changes in routine and movement, often picking up on details others overlook.
Working primarily outside the estate, Oliver is less involved in the household’s daily routines, though his position allows him to notice anything unusual around the grounds.
